message:
chore(core): remove redundant tokio runtime bootstrap blocks from test helpers

The #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")] tokio runtime + _guard
blocks in run_async_test() helpers across ~25 modules were redundant —
runtime_compat::RuntimeBuilder already handles the runtime setup
internally.  Removing them eliminates dead code and simplifies test
bootstrap.

Affected modules: approval, cleanup, events, ingest, ipc, mcp_tools,
metrics, outcome, policy, pool, recorder_migration, replay, reports,
sharding, snapshot_engine, spsc_ring_buffer, storage, tailer,
tui/query, vendored/mux_client, vendored/mux_pool, watchdog, web/sse,
wezterm, workflows/mod.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
